layer_1_rules.title: ITR-4 Eligible — Presumptive Income under Section 44AD or 44ADA
layer_1_rules.change_required: Update turnover threshold, presumptive rate, and finance_act citation. Increment MINOR version.

layer_2_decisions.title: Which ITR form must be filed?
layer_2_decisions.change_required: Review D-001 inputs and logic. If threshold changes, update the decision description.

layer_2_decisions.title: Is the taxpayer eligible for ITR-4?
layer_2_decisions.change_required: Update eligibility boundary in D-005 description and decision object.

layer_3_decision_trees.change_required: Update node-008 condition: '≤ ₹X crore' threshold comment.

layer_5_cases.title: Salary + Gig Income → ITR-4
layer_5_cases.change_required: Recheck if synthetic case inputs still fall within new thresholds. Update notes if needed.

layer_6_tests.change_required: Verify business_turnover input still qualifies under new limit. Add boundary test at new threshold.

layer_7_prompts.change_required: Update any hardcoded threshold values in the prompt (e.g. '₹3 crore').

update_procedure: 1. Read the Finance Act amendment — identify the new threshold and effective date.
2. Update SEC-002 in section-registry.json: last_amended_by, last_amended_date, key_thresholds.
3. Create a new Change entry CH-XXXX.json for each affected object.
4. Update R-0004: increment MINOR version, update logic.if threshold, update authority.finance_act and effective_from.
5. Update D-001 and D-005 descriptions if the boundary condition changed.
6. Update DT-001 YAML — any node with a threshold comment referencing the old amount.
7. Review C-000001 case inputs — if the synthetic case taxpayer's turnover is now at a boundary, adjust.
8. Update T-0006 and T-0007 — add a boundary test at the new threshold limit.
9. Update P-001 if any hardcoded threshold values appear in the prompt template.
11. Update CHANGELOG.md with all CH-XXXX entries.
12. Run all affected tests to verify nothing regressed.
13. Git commit with message: '[SEC-002] Finance Act YYYY — Section 44AD threshold update'
